name: HG/T 20570.2-1995
source: HG/T 20570.2《安全阀的设置和选用(下篇)：安全阀泄放量计算》

coefficients.description: Fallback discharge coefficient used when HG/T gas-service manufacturer data are unavailable in the current implementation.
Fallback discharge coefficient used when HG/T steam-service manufacturer data are unavailable in the current implementation.
Default back pressure correction factor for spring-loaded safety valves.
Default combination correction factor fallback for the current implementation.
Atmospheric pressure used for gauge to absolute conversion.
Universal gas constant used in fallback property handling.
Lower bound of simplified steam compressibility estimator when a full HG/T steam table workflow is unavailable.
Upper bound of simplified steam compressibility estimator when a full HG/T steam table workflow is unavailable.
Minimum pressure range for HG/T 20570.2 applicability.
Upper pressure range limit for HG/T 20570.2 applicability.
Wetted-height cap for external-fire wetted surface calculations in HG/T 20570.2.
